sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53629" key="kastei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καστεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (Lat. <sense id="n53629.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">castus</tr_>) in pl., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ascetic practices</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Procl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
